pillars.label: Architecture Fitness
pillars.detail: Cycle and coupling ratchets established (baseline: 0 cycle(s), 0 unstable hub(s)).

pillars.label: Testing
pillars.detail: Coverage ratchet: yes; mutation gate: yes; regression gates: yes. No acceptance-test artifacts yet under specs/test_artefacts/acceptance/ (G20 not yet adopted — informational, doesn't affect this pillar's status).

pillars.label: Code Quality / Modularity Freshness
pillars.detail: No modularity staleness — the last real review covers all currently unstable hubs.

pillars.label: Documentation / Navigation
pillars.detail: Living code-graph exists and derived navigation is present and not stamped stale.

pillars.label: Observability
pillars.detail: observability.enabled is false — the RED-metrics baseline is explicitly opted out.
pillars.remediation: Set project-manifest.json#observability.enabled:true if this project has a backend to instrument.

pillars.label: Security & Governance
pillars.detail: Baseline secrets scan always active. Enhanced tools — semgrep: yes, gitleaks: no, dep-audit: yes.
pillars.remediation: Install the missing enhanced tool(s) (semgrep, gitleaks, and/or npm/pip audit) so `/gate` can run the full computational security tier.
